meaning: n.哥伦比亚人adj.哥伦比亚的
examples: Forty minutes later, they left Colombian airspace.
To get our Colombian visas we bused back to Medellin.
If I'm the one winning every time I deal, I'll end up with a Colombian necktie.
Under the current Andean trade act, most Colombian exports come into the U.S. without being taxed.
The pueblo of grass roofed buildings, round river-stone plazas and pre-Colombian magic is off limits to camera-clad foreigners.
